voiceover_text: Painting or sanding? Skip hours of cleanup. Pre-taped masking film combines yellow tape and clear PE film in one roll. First press the yellow tape firmly along the cabinet edge. Then pull the film down to cover the tile and countertop. Fix the far edge, pull tight, and tear by hand. Paint and dust stay on the film. Peel it away with the mess and leave far less cleanup behind.

scenes.title: TAPE + FILM IN ONE
scenes.caption: Yellow tape and clear PE film in one roll.

scenes.title: TAPE FIRST
scenes.caption: Press the yellow tape firmly first.

scenes.title: PULL DOWN TO COVER
scenes.caption: Then pull the clear film down.

scenes.title: TEAR BY HAND
scenes.caption: Fix, pull tight, and tear by hand.

scenes.title: PAINT STAYS ON FILM
scenes.caption: Paint and dust stay on the film.

scenes.title: PEEL CLEAN
scenes.caption: Remove the mess with the film.

verified_claims.F1: The transparent PE film and top yellow masking tape are permanently connected as one product.
verified_claims.F2: Correct installation presses and secures the yellow tape before pulling the film down.
verified_claims.F3: The transparent film can cover countertops, tile, furniture, and other renovation surfaces.
verified_claims.F4: After the far edge is fixed and the film is tensioned, the film can be torn by hand without scissors.
verified_claims.F5: During painting or sanding, paint and dust collect on the exposed film surface.
verified_claims.F6: The product is removed from the tape edge with the dirty film and is intended not to damage the furniture finish or leave adhesive residue.
verified_claims.F7: Removing the contaminated film reduces the cleanup work after the job.
